title: What if Rei had lived with Misato and Shinji instead of As
display_title: What if Rei had lived with Misato and Shinji instead of As
wikitext:
[]: What if Rei had lived with Misato & Shinji instead of As             Quote Post by DevRei17 » Sat Jan 02, 2010 10:59 pm Would the storyline/events change at all? Would Rei open more actually living with other people? How would Asuka's relationship with the rest of them differ? EDIT: Asuka's name got caught off. Sorry!

[]:             Quote Post by Joseph the PRPD » Sat Jan 02, 2010 11:04 pm Rei would probably experience a change in character. Maybe not a major change but change none the less.

[]:             Quote Post by NemZ » Sun Jan 03, 2010 12:06 am Naked wandering leads to wacky hijinks.

[]:             Quote Post by GasmaskAvenger » Sun Jan 03, 2010 12:26 am for one thing, she would be nowhere nearly as close to Gendo as she was

[]:             Quote Post by Uriel Septim VII » Sun Jan 03, 2010 3:40 am Shinji would be a lot happier and there would be no Instrumentality thanks to his disapproval of mankind.

[]:             Quote Post by Mr. Tines » Sun Jan 03, 2010 4:16 am I could see the toothpicks scene playing out with Rei taking Pen-Pen's place -- just imagine Shinji gesticulating wildly at a completely deadpan Rei in artfully draped towel standing next to him.

[]:             Quote Post by Sailor Star Dust » Sun Jan 03, 2010 4:24 am NemZ wrote: Naked wandering leads to wacky hijinks.

[]:             Quote Post by GasmaskAvenger » Sun Jan 03, 2010 5:39 am Mr. Tines wrote: I could see the toothpicks scene playing out with Rei taking Pen-Pen's place -- just imagine Shinji gesticulating wildly at a completely deadpan Rei in artfully draped towel standing next to him.

[]:             Quote Post by Allemann » Sun Jan 03, 2010 10:40 am What would happen to poor Asuka then? Relegated to Rei's apartment?

[]:             Quote Post by Joseph the PRPD » Sun Jan 03, 2010 11:11 am Allemann wrote: What would happen to poor Asuka then? Relegated to Rei's apartment?

[]:             Quote Post by DevRei17 » Sun Jan 03, 2010 12:04 pm Joseph the PRPD wrote: Allemann wrote: What would happen to poor Asuka then? Relegated to Rei's apartment?

[]:             Quote Post by Joseph the PRPD » Sun Jan 03, 2010 12:08 pm Except Asuka and Shinji's relationship wouldn't be the same like it was in the series and she'd probably feel a little more hostile toward him.

[]:             Quote Post by Mr. Tines » Sun Jan 03, 2010 1:05 pm Joseph the PRPD wrote: That or she'd move in with Kaji or someone else all together.

[]:             Quote Post by ZapX » Sun Jan 03, 2010 1:07 pm And then Asuka was a lesbian.

[]:             Quote Post by NemZ » Sun Jan 03, 2010 1:29 pm Nah, for maximum Eva-style "screw with Shinji's head" action, Asuka would need to be assigned to live with Gendo.

[]:             Quote Post by Butterscotch » Sun Jan 03, 2010 2:47 pm Interesting. I say it would be really funny if Rei, Asuka and Misato all lived together. I could see Asuka having to sleep in the same bed as Rei, pulling off the covers, kicking and being moody and eventually would go insane possibly begging to move out. There would be lots of fights I say. :)

[]:             Quote Post by Allemann » Sun Jan 03, 2010 4:52 pm Butterscotch wrote: I could see Asuka having to sleep in the same bed as Rei, pulling off the covers, kicking and being moody and eventually would go insane possibly begging to move out. There would be lots of fights I say. :)

[]:             Quote Post by child of Lilith » Sun Jan 03, 2010 5:18 pm I think there would be a slight change in Rei but not much of one. The only real problem I can see with Rei moving in would be the effect it would have on Asuka. Considering how aggressive she is and her constant need to prove herself to be the best, I think living with Rei would dive her up the wall in short order. Asuka would just keep pushing Rei to get some kind of rise out of her and when this tactic would continue to fail over and over again, she’d eventual blow her top. Plus I can’t see Asuka being too happy with Rei getting to spend so much time with Shinji.

[]:             Quote Post by Uriel Septim VII » Sun Jan 03, 2010 7:29 pm Allemann wrote: Or some female-to-female action, if you know what I mean.

[]:             Quote Post by DevRei17 » Sun Jan 03, 2010 8:11 pm Hell, imagine if became like a bad sitcom like Full House. We would have everyone living in that apartment: Misato, Shinji, Pen Pen, Asuka, Rei, Kaji, Toji, Kensuke, Hakari, Ritsuko, Maya, Aoba, Gendo, etc, etc...
